title: ジャパンCの後に・重なり合う源流

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black managed to power her way past the
finish line. I rush out to meet her.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, Trainer! Just listen to them
chant!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: KI-TA-SAN! KI-TA-SAN!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It feels like we've finally made it. All the goals,
the fame, and the achievements we've been
chasing after are finally in sight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black has run against the world and
successfully represented her country as Japan's
clutch captain.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Kita! Kita!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia! Did you see me out there?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, of course. Um... I noticed something halfway
through the race, but...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Did you lose a cleat? I could have sworn I saw it
coming off...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... You saw it happen, huh? It felt weird
running with only one for half the race, but, well...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's racing for you. No matter what happens,
you can't panic because the race must go on!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I get the job done, no matter what comes up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has become the living definition of
resolution. With this, we're finally ready for the
showdown at the end of the year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night, the two visit a place full of memories.
They stop by the special place where they first
promised to run together.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's finally happening, Dia... What we've always
dreamed about...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes. We're finally going to run in the Arima Kinen.
Remember how we joined hands like sisters and
swore on it?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Sisters... I've been trying my best to be a good
older sister to you, but I wonder... Did I do a
good enough job?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Because when I think back on it...

text_block_list.name: Young Dia
text_block_list.text:
Kita! Look, look! I built that block castle you
showed me how to make!

text_block_list.name: Young Kitasan
text_block_list.text:
You did? Already? It took me forever to get it to
stay up, but you got it on the first try?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Everything I struggled with was a piece of cake
for you. You were a real model student, too.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you would've been just fine even without
me...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: No, no! You've got it all wrong, Kita!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I was only able to do things so well because you
showed me how to do them first.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You've always thrown yourself headfirst into
things, just to show me the way. Even when things
didn't work out, you'd still teach me what I
needed to do.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's not a failure. You might think you failed,
Kita, but "we" certainly haven't.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We've always marched on with you in the front
and me following behind you, and look how far
we've come.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I look up at the night sky and see the
Milky Way twinkling above me, it occurs to me...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I realize we're both in the same boat, riding along
the same river, and heading toward the same goal
together.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The two of us are different in so many ways, but
deep down in our heart of hearts, we are more
alike than anyone else...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Even though we aren't sisters by blood, we're
truer sisters than anyone else out there.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Truer sisters than anyone else...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I've always felt your joy and pain as
if they were my own.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Nobody has a stronger connection than ours!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Exactly I feel all your feelings as if they were mine
too.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Here we are, true sisters in all but blood, pushing
one another to greater heights as we advance
down the river...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You know what, Dia? When it's time for the Arima
Kinen, let's enter the gates with our hearts as one!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Let's walk in, just like we did when we stepped
past Tracen's gates on the first day of school, and
vow not to lose to each other!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes. We'll enter the race with our hearts united,
just as they've always been, and always will be...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their friendship is as vast and deep as the Milky
Way itself, and the current of their love is ever
connected in the depths of their hearts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if their stream diverges, they will always
converge once more. And when they clash at the
Arima Kinen, they will become one.
